scope: sidecar-backed concept-stub verification for the 94.0 cohort gate
learner_facing_quality_improvement: The real-qrel gate now accepts concept IDs that already exist in the current lexical sidecar, so learner-facing cohort regressions are verified against the live corpus snapshot instead of failing on catalog promotion lag alone.
notes: This wave stayed inside the qrel verifier, its narrow unit test, and a lane-local report artifact.
The verifier now uses state/cs_rag/r3_lexical_sidecar.json as the allowed stub source for expected_concepts that are present in the live corpus but not yet promoted into concepts.v3.json.
